title: SIZE GUIDE
howToMeasureIntro: Follow these easy steps to get the right size for your kid:
step1: Ask your kid to step on a piece of paper with their heel slightly touching a wall behind.
step2: Mark the end of their longest toe on the paper and measure from the wall to the mark.
step3: Do the same for the other foot and compare measurements with our size chart to find the right size.
sockMeasureAlt: Foot wearing a sock with heel-to-toe measurement guide
